MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Text Ruling

Mo To Compel Responses To Form Interrogs & Pltfs' Depositions And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Defendant Max Schwarz's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories and Plaintiffs' Depositions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs' failure to respond and failure to appear for deposition were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond to the Form Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiffs are further ordered to appear for their depositions on dates to be noticed by Defendant and to be completed no later than September 8, 2006. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $337.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2006 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-16-06; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Nov-13-06 At 11:00 A.M.
